subcodes.title: Tajalliyat (Effulgences)
subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him and that He Who hath appeared is the Hidden Mystery
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی اتی انه هو السر المکنون و الرمز المخزون و
